info.title: Apache Hive WebHCat (Templeton) API
info.description: REST API for Apache Hive providing DDL operations, job submission (MapReduce, Pig, Hive), and metadata management through WebHCat (formerly Templeton).

get.description: Returns a list of all databases.
Returns details of a specific database.
Returns a list of tables in a database.
Returns a list of partitions for a table.
Returns details of a specific partition.
Returns a list of columns for a table.
Returns details of a specific column.

put.description: Adds a column to a table.

post.description: Creates and queues a Hadoop MapReduce streaming job.
Creates and queues a Hadoop MapReduce job with a jar file.
Creates and queues a Pig job.

file.description: HDFS file with Pig Latin script

post.description: Runs a Hive query or set of sequential Hive queries.
Runs a Hive query with added resources.

get.description: Returns a list of all job IDs.
Check the status of a job given its job ID.

delete.description: Kill a job given its job ID.

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic authentication with Hadoop user credentials

callback.name: callback
callback.description: URL to be called upon job completion (webhooks). You can use this to get a callback when the job is complete.

statusdir.name: statusdir
statusdir.description: Directory where WebHCat will write the status of the job
